
Index Fits {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row
-------------------------------------

### Index Fits with Residuals

```{r idx_fits_resid}
# Per fleet: fit row + residual row; stocks as columns when multi-stock.

idx <- mv$index_fits
has_idx_stock <- "stock" %in% names(idx) && length(unique(idx$stock)) > 1L

if (has_idx_stock) {
  fit_combos <- unique(idx[, c("fleet", "stock"), drop = FALSE])
} else {
  all_fleets <- unique(idx$fleet)
  fit_combos <- data.frame(fleet = all_fleets, stock = NA_character_,
                           stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
}
fit_combos <- fit_combos[vapply(seq_len(nrow(fit_combos)), function(k) {
  fl  <- fit_combos$fleet[k]
  stk <- fit_combos$stock[k]
  obs_vals <- if (!is.na(stk)) idx$obs[idx$fleet == fl & idx$stock == stk] else idx$obs[idx$fleet == fl]
  any(!is.na(obs_vals))
}, logical(1)), , drop = FALSE]

fc              <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = unique(fit_combos$fleet))
fleet_names_all <- unique(fit_combos$fleet)
idx_stocks      <- if (has_idx_stock) unique(idx$stock) else NA_character_
fleet_plots     <- list()

has_idx_q  <- "quarter" %in% names(idx) && length(unique(idx$quarter)) > 1L
q_symbols  <- c("circle", "square", "diamond", "triangle-up",
                "cross", "x", "pentagon", "hexagon",
                "star", "hourglass", "bowtie", "asterisk")
yr_ticks   <- sort(unique(idx$year))

# Returns list(p, n_traces, idx_single, idx_q_pred) so caller can compute toggle indices.
make_fit_panel <- function(fl, stk, has_stk, panel_lbl) {
  sub      <- if (has_stk) idx[idx$fleet == fl & idx$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else idx[idx$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  x_col    <- if (has_idx_q) "x_pos" else "year"
  quarters <- if (has_idx_q) sort(unique(sub$quarter)) else 1L

  p_fit        <- plot_ly()
  trace_cursor <- 0L
  idx_single   <- NA_integer_
  idx_q_pred   <- integer(0)

  if (!is.null(mv$vulnerable_biomass)) {
    vb <- mv$vulnerable_biomass[mv$vulnerable_biomass$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
    if (nrow(vb) > 0) {
      p_fit <- add_lines(p = p_fit, x = vb$year, y = vb$est,
        line = list(color = "#cccccc", width = 1.5), showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = "VB %{x}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
      trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
    }
  }

  # Single chronological pred line (visible by default).
  all_pred <- sub[!is.na(sub$pred) & sub$pred > 0, , drop = FALSE]
  all_pred <- all_pred[order(all_pred[[x_col]]), , drop = FALSE]
  if (nrow(all_pred) > 0) {
    p_fit <- add_lines(p = p_fit, x = all_pred[[x_col]], y = all_pred$pred,
      line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
      visible = TRUE,
      hovertemplate = "Pred %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>")
    idx_single   <- trace_cursor
    trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
  }

  # Per-quarter pred lines (hidden by default; toggled on when user switches).
  if (has_idx_q) {
    for (q in quarters) {
      q_sub    <- sub[sub$quarter == q, , drop = FALSE]
      pred_sub <- q_sub[!is.na(q_sub$pred) & q_sub$pred > 0, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(pred_sub) > 0) {
        p_fit <- add_lines(p = p_fit, x = pred_sub[[x_col]], y = pred_sub$pred,
          line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 2), showlegend = FALSE,
          visible = FALSE,
          hovertemplate = paste0("Q", q, " Pred %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
        idx_q_pred   <- c(idx_q_pred, trace_cursor)
        trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
      }
    }
  }

  # Per-quarter obs markers (always visible).
  for (q in quarters) {
    q_sub   <- if (has_idx_q) sub[sub$quarter == q, , drop = FALSE] else sub
    obs_sub <- q_sub[!is.na(q_sub$obs) & q_sub$obs > 0, , drop = FALSE]
    q_pfx   <- if (has_idx_q) paste0("Q", q, " ") else ""
    if (nrow(obs_sub) > 0) {
      has_ci <- "obs_lwr" %in% names(obs_sub) && any(!is.na(obs_sub$obs_lwr))
      p_fit <- add_markers(p = p_fit, x = obs_sub[[x_col]], y = obs_sub$obs,
        marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 6,
                      symbol = if (has_idx_q) q_symbols[(q - 1L) %% length(q_symbols) + 1L] else "circle",
                      line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
        error_y = if (has_ci) list(
          type = "data", symmetric = FALSE,
          array = obs_sub$obs_upr - obs_sub$obs,
          arrayminus = obs_sub$obs - obs_sub$obs_lwr,
          color = fc[fl], thickness = 1, width = 4
        ) else NULL,
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = paste0(q_pfx, "Obs %{x:.2f}: %{y:.3g}<extra></extra>"))
      trace_cursor <- trace_cursor + 1L
    }
  }

  lay_fit <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay_fit$annotations  <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
  lay_fit$yaxis$title  <- "Index"
  if (has_idx_q) {
    lay_fit$xaxis$tickmode <- "array"
    lay_fit$xaxis$tickvals <- as.list(yr_ticks)
    lay_fit$xaxis$ticktext <- as.list(as.character(yr_ticks))
  }

  list(
    p          = do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_fit), lay_fit)),
    n_traces   = trace_cursor,
    idx_single = idx_single,
    idx_q_pred = idx_q_pred
  )
}

make_resid_panel <- function(fl, stk, has_stk) {
  sub       <- if (has_stk) idx[idx$fleet == fl & idx$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE] else idx[idx$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
  x_col     <- if (has_idx_q) "x_pos" else "year"
  resid_sub <- sub[!is.na(sub$residual), , drop = FALSE]
  p_resid   <- plot_ly()
  if (nrow(resid_sub) > 0) {
    resid_col <- ifelse(resid_sub$residual >= 0, "#d62728", "#1f77b4")
    p_resid <- add_bars(p = p_resid, x = resid_sub[[x_col]], y = resid_sub$residual,
      marker = list(color = resid_col), showlegend = FALSE,
      hovertemplate = "%{x:.2f}: %{y:.3f}<extra></extra>")
  }
  lay_resid <- modelVis::mv_layout()
  lay_resid$yaxis$title <- "Residual"
  lay_resid$shapes <- list(list(type = "line",
    x0 = min(yr_ticks), x1 = max(yr_ticks) + if (has_idx_q) (max(idx$quarter) - 1L) / max(idx$quarter) else 0,
    y0 = 0, y1 = 0,
    line = list(color = "#666666", dash = "dash")))
  if (has_idx_q) {
    lay_resid$xaxis$tickmode <- "array"
    lay_resid$xaxis$tickvals <- as.list(yr_ticks)
    lay_resid$xaxis$ticktext <- as.list(as.character(yr_ticks))
  }
  do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_resid), lay_resid))
}

# Tags this widget with class "mv-idx-fleet" and stores toggle metadata directly
# on the element so the shared button can find it via querySelectorAll.
# Avoids the global-dict + getElementById pattern that breaks on the last element.
attach_idx_toggle <- function(p, panel_results, offsets) {
  toggle_idxs <- unlist(mapply(function(res, off) {
    has_s <- !is.na(res$idx_single)
    n_q   <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
    if (has_s && n_q > 0) c(res$idx_single, res$idx_q_pred) + off else integer(0)
  }, panel_results, offsets, SIMPLIFY = FALSE))
  if (length(toggle_idxs) == 0L) return(p)

  vis_s <- unlist(lapply(panel_results, function(res) {
    n_q <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
    if (!is.na(res$idx_single) && n_q > 0) c(TRUE, rep(FALSE, n_q)) else integer(0)
  }))
  vis_q <- unlist(lapply(panel_results, function(res) {
    n_q <- length(res$idx_q_pred)
    if (!is.na(res$idx_single) && n_q > 0) c(FALSE, rep(TRUE, n_q)) else integer(0)
  }))

  meta_json <- jsonlite::toJSON(list(
    single  = list(visible = vis_s,        indices = as.integer(toggle_idxs)),
    quarter = list(visible = vis_q,        indices = as.integer(toggle_idxs))
  ))

  htmlwidgets::onRender(p, sprintf(
    'function(el,x){el.classList.add("mv-idx-fleet");el._mvToggle=%s;}',
    meta_json
  ))
}

for (fl in fleet_names_all) {
  if (!has_idx_stock) {
    stk       <- fit_combos$stock[fit_combos$fleet == fl][1L]
    has_stk   <- !is.na(stk)
    panel_lbl <- if (has_stk) paste(fl, stk, sep = " - ") else fl
    fit_res   <- make_fit_panel(fl, stk, has_stk, panel_lbl)
    p_resid   <- make_resid_panel(fl, stk, has_stk)
    p_pair    <- subplot(fit_res$p, p_resid, nrows = 2, shareX = TRUE,
                         titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE,
                         heights = c(0.68, 0.32), margin = 0.04)
    p_pair    <- layout(p = p_pair, xaxis = list(title = "Year"))
    p_out     <- modelVis::mv_config(p = p_pair)
    if (has_idx_q)
      p_out <- attach_idx_toggle(p_out, list(fit_res), list(0L))
    fleet_plots[[length(fleet_plots) + 1L]] <- p_out
  } else {
    fit_results  <- lapply(idx_stocks, function(stk) make_fit_panel(fl, stk, TRUE, stk))
    resid_panels <- lapply(idx_stocks, function(stk) make_resid_panel(fl, stk, TRUE))
    all_panels   <- c(lapply(fit_results, `[[`, "p"), resid_panels)
    p_fleet <- do.call(subplot, c(all_panels, list(
      nrows = 2, shareX = TRUE, titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE,
      heights = c(0.68, 0.32), margin = 0.04
    )))
    p_fleet <- layout(p = p_fleet, xaxis = list(title = "Year"), title = fl)
    p_out   <- modelVis::mv_config(p = p_fleet)
    if (has_idx_q) {
      fit_counts  <- sapply(fit_results, `[[`, "n_traces")
      fit_offsets <- as.list(cumsum(c(0L, fit_counts[-length(fit_counts)])))
      p_out <- attach_idx_toggle(p_out, fit_results, fit_offsets)
    }
    fleet_plots[[length(fleet_plots) + 1L]] <- p_out
  }
}

h_idx      <- if (has_idx_stock) 380L else 320L
plot_items <- if (length(fleet_plots) == 1L) {
  list(fleet_plots[[1L]])
} else {
  lapply(fleet_plots, function(p) {
    htmltools::div(style = paste0("height:", h_idx, "px; margin-bottom:10px;"), p)
  })
}

if (has_idx_q) {
  toggle_ui <- htmltools::HTML('
    <div style="margin-bottom:6px;">
      <button id="mv-idx-btn-s" class="btn btn-xs btn-primary"
        onclick="mvIdxLineToggle(\'single\')">Single line</button>
      <button id="mv-idx-btn-q" class="btn btn-xs btn-default"
        style="margin-left:4px;" onclick="mvIdxLineToggle(\'quarter\')">Per quarter</button>
    </div>
    <script>
    function mvIdxLineToggle(mode) {
      document.querySelectorAll(".mv-idx-fleet").forEach(function(gd) {
        if (gd._mvToggle && gd._mvToggle[mode]) {
          try {
            Plotly.restyle(gd, {visible: gd._mvToggle[mode].visible}, gd._mvToggle[mode].indices);
          } catch(e) { console.error("mv-idx toggle error:", gd.id, e); }
        }
      });
      document.getElementById("mv-idx-btn-s").className =
        mode === "single" ? "btn btn-xs btn-primary" : "btn btn-xs btn-default";
      document.getElementById("mv-idx-btn-q").className =
        mode === "quarter" ? "btn btn-xs btn-primary" : "btn btn-xs btn-default";
      document.getElementById("mv-idx-btn-q").style.marginLeft = "4px";
    }
    </script>
  ')
  htmltools::tagList(c(list(toggle_ui), plot_items))
} else {
  htmltools::tagList(plot_items)
}
```
